---
title: "Generative AI Timeline"
subtitle: "MGMT 675: Generative AI for Finance"
author: "Kerry Back, Rice University"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, revealjs-style.scss]
    highlight-style: monokai
    slide-number: c
    transition: fade
    navigation-mode: linear
    width: 1920
    height: 1080
    margin: 0.05
    center: true
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
          .tl-slide {
            background: #0f172a !important;
          }
          .tl-slide h2 {
            color: #f59e0b !important;
            font-size: 1.4em !important;
            border-bottom: 3px solid #f59e0b !important;
            margin-bottom: 0.6em !important;
          }
          .timeline-wrap {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            padding-top: 1em;
          }
          .timeline-line {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 2.8em;
            left: 2%;
            right: 2%;
            height: 4px;
            background: #3b82f6;
            opacity: 0.6;
          }
          .timeline-events {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-end;
            padding: 0 2%;
            position: relative;
          }
          .tl-event {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            position: relative;
            flex: 1;
          }
          .tl-label {
            writing-mode: vertical-lr;
            transform: rotate(180deg);
            color: #e2e8f0;
            font-size: 0.52em;
            line-height: 1.3;
            white-space: nowrap;
            padding-bottom: 0.6em;
          }
          .tl-stem {
            width: 2px;
            height: 2.2em;
            background: #3b82f6;
            opacity: 0.5;
          }
          .tl-dot {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
            background: #3b82f6;
            border-radius: 50%;
            flex-shrink: 0;
          }
          .tl-date {
            color: #e2e8f0;
            font-size: 0.55em;
            margin-top: 0.5em;
            opacity: 0.8;
            white-space: nowrap;
          }
          </style>
    include-after-body:
      - text: |
          <script src="https://hypothes.is/embed.js" async></script>
---

## Before ChatGPT: 2017–2022 {.tl-slide}

:::{.timeline-wrap}
:::{.timeline-line}
:::
:::{.timeline-events}

:::{.tl-event}
[\"Attention Is All You Need\" — transformers]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Jun 2017]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[GPT-1 (117M params); BERT]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Jun 2018]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[GPT-2 (1.5B params)]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Feb 2019]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[GPT-3 (175B params) — few-shot learning]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Jun 2020]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[DALL·E; GitHub Copilot; LaMDA]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Jun 2021]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Stable Diffusion; PaLM; Anthropic founded]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Aug 2022]{.tl-date}
:::

:::
:::

## After ChatGPT: Nov 2022 – Dec 2023 {.tl-slide}

:::{.timeline-wrap}
:::{.timeline-line}
:::
:::{.timeline-events}

:::{.tl-event}
[ChatGPT — 100M users in 2 months]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Nov 2022]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Microsoft invests $10B in OpenAI; Bard]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Jan 2023]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Meta LLaMA — open-source movement]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Feb 2023]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[GPT-4 (multimodal); Claude 1.0]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Mar 2023]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Claude 2 (100K context); Llama 2]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Jul 2023]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Amazon invests $4B in Anthropic]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Sep 2023]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Mistral 7B — European open-source AI]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Oct 2023]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[GPT-4 Turbo (128K); Altman fired & reinstated]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Nov 2023]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Google Gemini; Mixtral 8x7B (MoE)]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Dec 2023]{.tl-date}
:::

:::
:::

## After ChatGPT: 2024 {.tl-slide}

:::{.timeline-wrap}
:::{.timeline-line}
:::
:::{.timeline-events}

:::{.tl-event}
[Sora announced (text→video); Bard → Gemini]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Feb 2024]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Claude 3 family (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus, 200K context)]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Mar 2024]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Llama 3 (8B and 70B)]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Apr 2024]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Gemini 1.5 Pro (1M context); GPT-4o]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[May 2024]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Claude 3.5 Sonnet — surpasses Opus]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Jun 2024]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Llama 3.1 (405B) — largest open-weight model]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Jul 2024]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[OpenAI o1 — first reasoning model; $6.6B raise]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Sep 2024]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Claude 3.5 Sonnet updated + computer use]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Oct 2024]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Sora public; full o1; Gemini 2.0 Flash]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Dec 2024]{.tl-date}
:::

:::
:::

## After ChatGPT: 2025 {.tl-slide}

:::{.timeline-wrap}
:::{.timeline-line}
:::
:::{.timeline-events}

:::{.tl-event}
[DeepSeek R1; Nvidia drops $600B; Stargate ($500B JV)]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Jan 2025]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Gemini 2.0 Pro + Deep Research; Mistral Small 3]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Feb 2025]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Claude 3.7 Sonnet (hybrid reasoning); Claude Code; o3-mini]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Mar 2025]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[o3 + o4-mini; Llama 4; Gemini 2.5 Pro]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[Apr 2025]{.tl-date}
:::

:::{.tl-event}
[Claude Sonnet 4 + Opus 4; OpenAI Codex]{.tl-label}
:::{.tl-stem}
:::
:::{.tl-dot}
:::
[May 2025]{.tl-date}
:::

:::
:::
